examples: What could AGI do for us, according to its supporters?
The promise and danger of true AGI (artificial general intelligence) are great.
DM, a company focused on the development of AGI, has an ambition to "solve intelligence".
The credit rate could be phased down to 2% of AGI over 5 years.
In 2000, high earners paid, overall, 26% of their AGI in federal income tax.
